title: stray-sweep output data
description: Shape of the ``data`` field on a ``stray-sweep`` envelope.

ssh_target.description: The login node that was swept.
ssh_target.title: Ssh Target

total_process_count.description: Total processes the user owns on the login node (fork-quota pressure).
total_process_count.title: Total Process Count

marked_count.description: How many of those carry the HPC_AGENT_OP framework marker.
marked_count.title: Marked Count

strays.description: MARKED processes older than max_age_sec — orphaned remote halves the timeout wrapper did not reap (or pre-wrapper residue).
strays.title: Strays

reaped_pids.description: PIDs actually killed this sweep (empty unless spec.reap was True and strays were found). Exactly the stray PIDs — never an unmarked process.
reaped_pids.title: Reaped Pids

reaped.description: Whether a reap was requested AND executed this sweep.
reaped.title: Reaped

needs_attention.description: True when the total process count exceeds warn_threshold OR any stray was found — the early-warning the fork-exhaustion incident lacked.
needs_attention.title: Needs Attention

summary.description: One-line human digest of the sweep (counts + verdict).
summary.title: Summary

StrayProcess.description: One MARKED framework process observed on the login node.

pid.description: Process id on the login node.
pid.title: Pid

etimes.description: Elapsed time in whole seconds since the process started.
etimes.title: Etimes

op.description: The HPC_AGENT_OP label parsed from the marker (verb/op tag), or null.
op.title: Op

args.description: The process's argv line (ps -o args), for the human.
args.title: Args

StrayProcess.title: stray-sweep marked process
